notes: W5.2 regression (W4+W6). blackbox is one of the 20 baseline services (not m365/copilot). Outcome IDENTICAL to W5.1/W5.0 baseline: 차단 rendered as chat response with status:blocked, captured via Copy button. Engine block intact. Test PC env note: Chrome windows live on virtual Desktop 2 with 125% DPI scaling (screenshot 1920x1080 = physical, cursor input space 1536x864 = logical; apply 0.8 factor for SetCursorPos).
